svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="OpenAI"> <diagram id="triceabc-readme-teaser" name="Trice ABC README teaser"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="970" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="860" pageHeight="190" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#38bdf8;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1f2937;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=12;" value="<b>sender source</b><br><br><font face="monospace">trice8C("FnName", data)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="218" x="32" y="82" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef9c3;strokeColor=#eab308;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1f2937;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=12;" value="<b>compact record</b><br><br><font face="monospace">ID + data</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="138" x="282" y="82" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#22c55e;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1f2937;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=12;" value="<b>selected local handler(s)</b><br><br><font face="monospace">FnName(date)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="186" x="450" y="82" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" edge="1" parent="1" source="4" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=2.2;html=1;rounded=0;" target="5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=2.2;html=1;rounded=0;" target="6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
